listings.docs: alex_list_pools (10+ pairs), alex_get_swap_quote, alex_swap. Tokens: STX, sBTC, ALEX, sUSDT, wBTC.

listings.docs: stack_stx(amount, poxAddressVersion, poxAddressHashbytes, startBurnHeight, lockPeriod). get_stacking_status(address). get_pox_info(). Current PoX cycle 132, min threshold 160K STX.

listings.docs: 2 pools: main (400K sat max, sbtc/usda/pepe swaps, 3M sats liquidity) + aibtc (1M sat max, sbtc/aibtc swaps, 900K sats). Min deposit 10K sats. styx_deposit(pool, amount), styx_pool_status(pool), styx_pools(), styx_price(), styx_fees().
listings.notes: Validated 2026-04-13. Both pools active. Main pool: 3M sats real available. aibtc pool: 900K sats.

listings_x402.docs: 8 free market data endpoints + 8 paid DeFi analytics. No auth needed for free tier. x402 payment for premium.
listings_x402.notes: Validated 2026-04-13. Comprehensive Stacks DeFi data: market stats, whale trades, token analysis, portfolio optimization. Best free market data API in ecosystem.

listings_p2p.docs: Cycle-based P2P auction. Deposit phase (150+ blocks ~5min), buffer (30 blocks), settle. Pyth oracle pricing (BTC $72,210, STX $0.214). XYK pool: 333K STX/BTC. Two markets: sbtc-stx, sbtc-usdcx. Min deposit: 1M micro-STX or 1000 sats. Cycle 13 active. jingswap_get_prices, jingswap_get_cycle_state, jingswap_deposit_stx, jingswap_deposit_sbtc, jingswap_settle_with_refresh, jingswap_get_cycles_history, jingswap_get_depositors, jingswap_cancel_stx, jingswap_cancel_sbtc.
listings_p2p.notes: Validated 2026-04-13. Cycle 13 in deposit phase. Oracle: Pyth BTC/USD + STX/USD. XYK + DLMM DEX pricing. Unique cycle-based auction model — agents can programmatically participate.

listings_data.endpoint: tenero_market_stats / tenero_top_gainers / tenero_top_losers / tenero_trending_pools / tenero_whale_trades / tenero_market_summary / tenero_holder_stats / tenero_token_info / tenero_wallet_holdings / tenero_wallet_trades / tenero_search
listings_data.docs: api.tenero.io. 90+ days of daily volume/netflow/trader time series. ~150-250 unique traders/day, ~50 active pools. Top gainers/losers by 24h pct, trending pools by volume, whale trade feed. Per-token market summary (weighted price, 24h volume, pool liquidity). Holder stats and wallet holdings/trades.
listings_data.notes: Validated 2026-04-14 via tenero_market_stats: 90 days of Stacks data. 04-13 showed 238 traders, 51 pools, $63K volume. Cross-chain support: stacks/spark/sportsfun.

listings_prediction.endpoint: stacks_market_list / stacks_market_get / stacks_market_buy_yes / stacks_market_buy_no / stacks_market_sell_yes / stacks_market_sell_no / stacks_market_redeem
listings_prediction.docs: 93 open markets (sports, crypto, politics). Binary yes/no with implied probability. stacks_market_list(status, category, limit), stacks_market_get(market_id), stacks_market_quote_buy/sell, stacks_market_buy_yes/no, stacks_market_sell_yes/no, stacks_market_redeem, stacks_market_get_position, stacks_market_search. Contract: SP3N5CN0PE7YRRP29X7K9XG22BT861BRS5BN8HFFA.
listings_prediction.notes: Validated 2026-04-13. 93 open markets, 19 pages. Most are sports (UEFA, NBA). Some crypto category available. Agents can programmatically trade prediction markets.
